title: Claim
description: An atomic factual or analytical claim with traceable sourcing. Renamed from 'evidence' per ratified decision §5.5 (CLAUDE.md §5). A Claim is implicitly quantitative iff value ≠ null (ratified §5.5 — no stored boolean). Cross-entity invariants P2 (must cite), P5′ (comparison pinning), P6′ (national_assertion coherence), P7′ (region_mentions coherence), P9 (indicator unit), P10/P11 (supersession DAG/freshness), P16 (methodology for quantitative) are Layer 1c Python predicates; their YAML fields are defined here.

statement.description: Human-readable assertion. Comparison claims (matching §5a Rule R3 regex) trigger P5′ checks.

value.description: Numeric or symbolic value. Non-null implies quantitative Claim; triggers P16 (methodology_tag required).

unit.description: Measurement unit string. Must match Indicator.unit when measured_by_ids is non-empty (P9, cross-entity — Python).

time_period.description: ISO 8601 date, year, or descriptive period string (e.g. '2018-2023', 'FY2024').

source_ids.description: YAML representation of E_cites edges (Claim → Source). ≥1 required (P2). Graph builder materialises to E_cites at load time.

scoped_to.description: Regions this Claim is scoped to. ≥1 required. Graph builder materialises to E_scoped_to. When |scoped_to| ≥ 2 and statement matches comparison regex, P5′ fires.

national_assertion.description: True iff the claim makes a national-level proposition. Typed YAML field for P6′: national_assertion → 'nz' ∈ scoped_to (Python invariant).

region_mentions.description: Regions explicitly named in the statement text. Typed YAML field for P7′: region_mentions ⊆ scoped_to (Python invariant). A lint warning may additionally flag unregistered mentions by canonical-name matching.

methodology_tag.description: Full ID of the Methodology used to produce this claim's quantity or comparison (e.g. 'methodology.median_multiple_v1'). Required for quantitative claims (P16) and comparison claims (P5′). Graph builder materialises to E_follows. Matches methodology.id pattern (ratified Option C, 2026-04-26).

supersedes_id.description: ID of the Claim this supersedes (the source vertex is the newer Claim, per §2 row 13). Graph builder materialises to E_supersedes. Supersession DAG acyclicity and freshness-monotonicity enforced in Python (P10, P11).

invokes_ids.description: Pattern IDs that this (regional Instance) Claim invokes as national-scale explanation. Graph builder materialises to E_invokes.

measured_by_ids.description: Indicator IDs that operationalise this Claim. Graph builder materialises to E_measured_by. Unit coherence enforced by P9 (Python).

iwi_scope.description: Iwi whose rohe this claim intersects — parallel spatial axis to scoped_to (ratified §5.4). Full Iwi enum is PI-tunable; maintained in content/_schema/iwi.py. Cross-entity handle for P17.

engagement_record_id.description: Reference into migration_log.yaml for the iwi engagement record. Required when iwi_scope ≠ [] (P17 — soft-warn until Mana Ōrite governance workflow is operational).
